title: GUI by Aiu Nekomachi HD
description: HD Edition of "GUI by Aiu Nekomachi"
body:
# Summary
This is the HD version of "[GUI by Aiu Nekomachi](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-by-aiu-nekomachi)".
For details, please see the distribution page for [GUI by Aiu Nekomachi](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-by-aiu-nekomachi).

The image was output at four times the original resolution (16 times the pixel count) from vector data.

### Example
128x128px → 512x512px

256x256px → 1024x1024px

This is only for the UI skin; the block textures remain unchanged.

# Notice
We have identified issues where some animations may be slightly misaligned with their original images, or straight lines may appear curved.
These are due to Minecraft's specifications and cannot be fixed by me.
